reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
개플룩으로 입히기 너무 귀여워요! 지금은 입기에 조금 덥고 조금 더 추워지면 더 잘 입을거 같아요!

잘 늘어나는 니트 소재라서 사이즈는 작게 입혀도 좋을거 같아요!
팔 있는 디자인이라 불편할까봐 크게 샀는데 6kg 강아지한테는 2XL 너무 컸고 9kg(뚱뚱한편) 강아지한테도 2Xl 여유롭게 잘 맞았어요!
reviews.content_en:
It's so cute on my pup with BITE ME! Right now it's a bit warm to wear, but once it gets a little colder, I think it'll be perfect!

The knit material stretches really well, so sizing down should work fine! I was worried about the arm design being uncomfortable, so I got a size up. The 2XL ended up being too big for my 6kg pup, but it fit my 9kg (on the chubby side) pup perfectly with room to spare!

reviews.name: 홍밥풀
reviews.content:
니트 촉감이 좋은 보들보들 니트!
평소 XL 사이즈인데 이것도 XL 사이즈 입었어요.

보들보들 니트는 다른 옷보다 등길이가 적당해서 더 좋았어요!
겨울옷도 크롭이 많아서 매번 등 시릴까 봐 걱정했는데 이 니트는 등 전체를 덮어주니까 겨울에 따뜻할 것 같아서 정말 만족해요!!
배색이 포인트 되어서 사랑스러운데 그림까지 밥풀이랑 닮은 것 같아서 넘 귀엽네요 ㅎㅎ

진~짜 따뜻해서 겨울에 요 니트 한 장만 입어도 털북숭이들은 따뜻할 것 같아요!!
꼬옥 장만해 보세요..🤎
reviews.content_en:
Such a soft, plush knit with a great feel!
I usually wear XL and got XL for this too.

The plush knit has a better back length compared to other clothes, which I really loved! So many winter clothes are cropped and I was always worried about my pup's back getting cold, but this knit covers the entire back so I'm sure it'll be nice and warm in winter - I'm really satisfied!!
The color blocking is such a cute accent, and the little bear graphic looks just like a grain of rice, which is adorable hehe 🤎

It's seriously so warm that even fluffy pups should stay toasty in winter with just this one knit!!
You should definitely get one for your pup..🤎

reviews.name: 여름
reviews.content:
이름처럼 정말 보들보들하고 부드러워서 처음 입자마자 기분 좋아지는 니트 ☁💖
따뜻하고 부드러운 컬러 배색에 곰돌이 그래픽까지 너무 귀엽고 사랑스러워요!
하이넥이라 바람 부는 날에도 목까지 포근하게 감싸줘서 추운 겨울까지 끄떡 없을 것 같아요🎅
무엇보다 신축성 좋은 니트 소재라 활동할 때도 편하고, 기분까지 포근해지는 촉감이라, 하루종일 입고 싶은 만족스러운 니트입니다!💕
reviews.content_en:
Just like its name, this is such a soft and cozy knit that I felt happy the moment my pup put it on ☁💖
With the warm and soft color blocking and cute teddy bear graphic, it's absolutely adorable and lovely!
The high neck keeps my pup's neck warm and cozy even on windy days, so it should handle the cold winter with no problem 🎅
Best of all, the stretchy knit material makes it comfortable for activity, and the cozy feel makes you want to wear it all day long - it's such a satisfying knit! 💕

reviews.name: 로미누나
reviews.content:
몸무게 4.1kg, 목둘레 23cm, 가슴둘레 38cm, 등길이 28cm
다리가 긴 말티즈 로미는 M 사이즈가 딱이었어요!🐕

이름처럼 보들보들한 소재와 포근한 컬러 조합이 매우 마음에 드는 니트예요! 가슴에 붙어 있는 감성적인 바잇미 라벨도 만족입니다🤎 쌀쌀한 가을과 초겨울에 단독으로 입히기 좋고, 겨울에는 조끼 패딩에 이너로 입혀도 귀여울 거 같아요!! 사진 보면 아시겠지만 생식기랑 거리가 있어서 오줌이 묻지 않아요👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
My pup Romi, a Maltese with long legs, weighs 4.1kg with a 23cm neck circumference, 38cm chest circumference, and 28cm back length - size M was perfect! 🐕

Just like the name, I love the plush material and cozy color combination! I'm also happy with the sentimental BITE ME label on the chest 🤎 It's great to wear alone during cool fall and early winter, and it would look cute as a layering piece under a vest puffer in winter!! As you can see in the photos, there's distance from the private area so urine doesn't get on it 👍🏻

reviews.name: 감자엄마
reviews.content:
이름처럼 정말로 보들보들한 니트에요♡
발톱에 살짝이라도 걸리면 울 풀리는게 쉬워서 겨울에 니트 잘 안사주는데 보들보들 니트는 촘촘하게 되어 있어서 발톱이 잘 안걸려서 정말 좋았어요! 
다리가 짧은 저희 강아지 한테도 잘 맞았고 적당히 도톰해서 옷이 너무 무겁지도 않아요. 겨울 니트 찾고 계신다면 이제품 완전 추천 드려요~
reviews.content_en:
Just like the name, it's truly a plush knit! ♡
My pup's nails used to snag easily and make the knit unravel, so I usually don't buy knits in winter, but this plush knit is tightly knitted so the nails don't catch - it's amazing!
It fit my short-legged pup well too, and it's thick enough without being too heavy. If you're looking for a winter knit, I totally recommend this product~

reviews.name: 건****
reviews.content:
2.5~2.6kg, 가슴둘레 36cm, 목둘레 25cm 단모와와입니당.
S size로 했더니 엉덩이까지 덮고 쉬야가 묻을 정도로 배쪽이 길었어요. 그래서 접어서 입혔는데 도톰한 소재라 흘러내리지 않고 잘 고정되어있더라고요. 신축성도 넘 좋아서 아이도 편안해하는 거 같아요
reviews.content_en:
My short-haired Chihuahua is 2.5-2.6kg with a 36cm chest circumference and 25cm neck circumference.
I got size S and it covered all the way to the butt and was long enough on the belly to get pee on it. So I folded it up to wear, but the thick material stays in place and doesn't slide down. The stretch is amazing too, so my pup seems really comfortable!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 와아! 빠르게 도착했어요. 바잇미 인스타그램 팔로우하고 있어서 이벤트 참여했었는데 떨어졌거든요 ㅜㅜ 근데도 눈에 밟하는 아이템이라 직접 구매해봤습니다😊 우리 아가공주에게 입히니까 너무너무 감성있고 색감이 예뻐요🦊🤎 추천합니다!!
reviews.content_en: Wow! It arrived so fast. I was following BITE ME on Instagram and participated in their event but didn't win ㅜㅜ But it was such an eye-catching item that I decided to buy it directly 😊 When I put it on my precious princess pup, it looks so aesthetic and the color is so pretty 🦊🤎 I recommend it!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 처음엔 입히기 불편한가? 했는데 잘 늘어나고 우리 강쥐가 편하게 잘 입네요. 천이 정말 좋아요. 물론 빨아 봐야 알겠지만 지금 봐서는 좋을 거 같아요^^  다른 곳에선 못 사겠어요. 만족합니다♡ 강아지가 편해합니다.
reviews.content_en: At first I wondered if it would be uncomfortable to put on, but it stretches really well and my pup wears it comfortably. The fabric is really nice. Of course, I'll know better after washing it, but it looks great so far ^^ I can't get this anywhere else. I'm satisfied! ♡ My pup is comfortable in it.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
후기보고 엑라 샀는데
좀 크네요 라지로 아이보리도 사려구요 이중조직인거같아요. 다른니트보다 도톰해서 하나만입히기에 아주좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought an extra large based on reviews, but it runs a bit big. I'm planning to get a large in ivory too. It looks like a double-knit construction. It's thicker than other knits so it's great for wearing just one layer.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 이뻐요~ 이런거 잘 안사주는데, 사주길 잘 했다는 생각이 드네요. 또 이런 제품 많이 만들어주세요~
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty~ I don't usually buy things like this, but I'm glad I got this one. Please make more products like this~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요~~ 따뜻해 보이고 겨울에 딱입니다!
reviews.content_en: So cute~~ It looks warm and is perfect for winter!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 넘모 귀여워요~ 봄 되기전까지 잘입힐 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: So adorable~~ I think my pup will wear it well until spring comes.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
3.1키로 남아
M사이즈 여유있게 맞아요
비싸긴하지만 이쁘긴 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: My boy is 3.1kg and the M size fits with room to spare. It's pricey but it's definitely pretty.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 크리스마스 선물로 준비했어요~ 조금 큰데~ 뭐 등전체를 따뜻하게 감싸주니 괜찮은듯!!
reviews.content_en: I got it as a Christmas gift~ It's a bit big, but since it covers and warms the entire back, it works out!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 브라운 엑스라지사고 커서 아이보리 라지로 입히니까 잘맞아요!  5.7kg말티푸입니다
reviews.content_en: I bought brown extra large but it was too big, so I'm wearing ivory large instead! My Maltipoo is 5.7kg.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 이쁘게 잘 입고있어요.
reviews.content_en: My pup looks so pretty wearing it.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 좋아요아주좋아요좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's great, really great, great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 따듯하고 잘어울려요. 애기도 만족해하는거 같습니다^^!
reviews.content_en: It's warm and looks great on my pup. My baby seems satisfied with it too^^ !

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미 옷들이 죄다 품절...
그래서 요걸로 또 샀어요
reviews.content_en: All the BITE ME clothes are sold out... so I bought this one again.

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content: 옷은 이쁩니다 근데 가격 대비 바느질이 너무 허접하고 밑에 단 꿰맨것도 풀어져 와서 제가 손봤습니다 이거 너무하네요
reviews.content_en: The clothes are pretty, but the stitching is really sloppy for the price and the hem came undone when it arrived, so I had to fix it myself. This is too much.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 댕댕이 3.2키로 되는데 m커요~~ s가 예쁠것같아요
reviews.content_en: My pup is 3.2kg and the M is too big~~ I think S would look better.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 보들보들하고예뻐요 사이즈도 잘맞아요
reviews.content_en: It's plush and pretty, and the size fits well too.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
다소 사이즈가 크네요
아주좋아요
reviews.content_en: It runs a bit big overall, but it's really great.

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
보통M사이즈를입어서
사이즈도보구구매했는데(가슴38등길이28)
받아보니큽니다 제가수선해서입히고있어요
밤에자고일어나면한쪽팔이빠져있어요~커서그런지
S은너무딱맞을까봐 ㅠㅠ 이쁘긴합니다
reviews.content_en: I usually wear M size so I bought based on the sizing chart (38cm chest, 28cm back length), but when it arrived it was too big. I'm hemming it to wear it. After sleeping at night and waking up, one arm keeps slipping off - probably because it's too big. S might fit perfectly but I'm worried it'll be too tight ㅠㅠ It's pretty though.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 보풀 나는것 없이 세탁후에도 짱짱하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: No pilling even after washing - it stays tight and looks great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 애기가 하얀색이라 다 잘어울리네요 !!
reviews.content_en: My pup is white so it matches everything really well!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 잘 입히고 있어요 보플이 약간 났어요
reviews.content_en: My pup wears it well, though it's pilled a bit.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 애완견이 따뜻해보여요, 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: My pet looks warm in it - I'm happy with it.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 추울떄 잘입고 다녔어요
reviews.content_en: It's cute! My pup wore it well when it was cold.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 처음 사봐요. 보기엔 예쁘네요
reviews.content_en: It's my first time buying this. It looks pretty!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 잘 입힐께요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! I'll dress them up in it.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 사이즈 잘 맞네요!!
reviews.content_en: The size fits perfectly!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 추울때 잘입고 다녔어요
reviews.content_en: They wore it well when it was cold.
